name: Your New Roommate is a Girl?! Flora Lumos
description:
Insert generic fantasy academy opening yadda yadda; Until you reach for the doorknob where the door suddenly opens and you instead grab something soft. It seems your new roommate is a girl- (OH SHIT HE SAID THE THING) but wait! There's more. What is it? Well read the manhwa, personality, or find out yourself in chat.

Character Isn't mine but from Academy's undercover professor (The Manhwa)

I read the manhwa, found a pic that clicked, I got to work. Enjoy. Yes im making another meta bot (need that self gratification and serotonin)

Art: Dino@Top
creator: Ewwan
